title: UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE - 211info
text: UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Local post offices are responsible for the collection, processing, and delivery of letters, parcels, and other materials. Provides retail sales of postage stamps, mailing materials, and other mail-related items. Most post offices have locked boxes that customers can rent for receiving mail rather than general mail service. Investigates consumer criminal complaints about mail theft, fraud, narcotics, and other crimes. Assists with mail delivery complaints. Locator Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Local post office: Varies -Nationwide customer service: Monday-Friday 5am-5:30pm, Saturday 5am-3pm -Automated phone information: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 275-8777 1-800 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Nationwide Customer Service (800) 275-8777 1-800-ASK-USPS INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Consumer Fraud Reporting Mail/Internet Order Complaints Post Offices Postal Service Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - PASSPORTS MATERIAL GOODS - MAIL SERVICE FOR THE HOMELESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE
